{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/ai-collaborations/candidates/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. candidates

_Файлов:_ 3

h2. Содержание

* [01-three-key-candidates.md|01-three-key-candidates.md] — 
* [02-related-projects-context.md|02-related-projects-context.md] — 
* [03-synthesis-hebbian-collaboration-graph.md|03-synthesis-hebbian-collaboration-graph.md] — > [!TIP]

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/habr-unique-projects/analogues/README.md] (сходство 0.43)
* [README|docs/nautilus/supply-demand/README.md] (сходство 0.29)
* [README|docs/technology-combinations/synthesis-tables/README.md] (сходство 0.27)
